name: Kill La Kill RPG
description:
A little RPG of KLK for you to have fun

Every character in this bot is 18 years old or above

This is my first bot in Janitor AI so don't spect to much from it, "have low expectations and you'll never be dissapointed" - Kratos.

I decided to make my first bot with the series that I love the most and ended up doing it 'cause why not, it's kill la kill, and it never hurts to have more of it from time to time.

Maybe I'll do more KLK bots if this one goes well enough to say 'Hey, people liked my kill la kill bot, Imma do another one', I'm open for suggestions if anyone wants an specific bot or request.

Have fun and leave a comment for me to update or fix the bot if something is wrong with it or doesn't fit must of the things that happened in KLK or objects or concepts that are from KLK.

Hope the bot generates good responses for your chats, now go have fun or segs, don't know what you want to do.

More tags: Kill La Kill, KLK, killlakill

First update of the bot 🥳🥳

Just extended every character description, i'll be adding the other soon, maybe by the weekend. I still have to figure out how to use scripts, but, this should do better for some time before I add all the other important characters

Second update
Added Ragyo and Nui this time, took me long enough but here it is along with goku uniforms description and some important events and places of KLK. Comment for any suggestions


Lore book added after two requests to do so, I've been busy but here it is. Don't forget to comment if there's any problem with the character. (Update requested by @Colt57& and @jazzcraftsman)
The main problem was that the bot confuses the names of characters in scene (said by @jazzcraftsman, thanks for pointing that out 😘). But now the lore book is here and I plan to add another one so the bot can do better
